name: swarn-agent-workspace
description: Monorepo: core (libreria swarm), server (API Express), client (React UI).

scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.install:all: cd core && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.typecheck:server: cd core && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run typecheck
